balance.description: Your available credit balance is shown in the lower-left corner. Debug, preview, and publish actions are tied to credits.
balance.title: Check your credit balance here

billingCard.descriptionWithDays: We have added {credits} trial credits to your account for {days} days. Check your credit balance here, or buy and upgrade plans when needed.
billingCard.descriptionWithExpiry: We have added {credits} trial credits to your account, valid until {expiresAt}. Check your credit balance here, or buy and upgrade plans when needed.
billingCard.title: Check credits and buy plans here

blankCourse.description: Create your own course here and build the content from scratch.
blankCourse.title: Click to create a new course

courseCreation.description: You can create a course from scratch or use Create courses with AI assistant to generate a first draft faster.
courseCreation.title: Start creating from here

guideCourse.description: This is the built-in creation guide course.
guideCourse.title: Start with the creation guide course

lobsterCourse.descriptionSuffix: to generate a first draft faster.
lobsterCourse.title: Create courses with AI assistant

upgrade.description: If your credits run low, you can purchase or upgrade here and keep creating without interruption.
upgrade.title: Upgrade here when credits run low

welcome.description: We have added {credits} trial credits to your account for {days} days. Let's take a quick tour of the key creation entry points.
welcome.title: Welcome to AI-Shifu

settingsEntry.title: Start by opening course settings here
settingsEntry.description: Use course settings to configure the model, listen mode, and pricing.

prompt.title: Edit the teaching prompt here
prompt.description: Write the lesson content here. Debug, preview, and publishing output are generated from this content.

debug.title: Run a debug preview here
debug.description: Use this to inspect the course output generated from the current prompt before publishing.

model.title: Choose the course model here
model.description: The model affects course quality, style, and usage cost.

listenMode.title: Turn on listen mode here
listenMode.description: Once enabled, learners can experience this course in listen mode.

price.title: Adjust the course price here
price.description: Confirm the course price before publishing.

preview.title: Preview the full course here
preview.description: Before publishing, preview the full course to confirm the learning flow and content presentation.

publish.title: Publish the course from here
publish.description: Once everything looks right, use this button to publish the course.
